synopsis:
Flying the captured TIE fighters, members of Rogue Squadron infiltrate the Imperial outpost on Spindrift and strafe its command towers. An Imperial Major and his underling Gerdy try to flee across a suspension bridge, but a TIE fighter destroys the far end and forces their surrender. They are stunned to find the pilots are Rebel officers Luke Skywalker, Thorben, Shira Brie, Gemmer, and Wald. After securing the base and recovering coordinates for a new Imperial armada, the Rebels return to Arbra.

Back at base, Shira Brie asks Leia for the return coordinates so she can visit her homeworld, Shalyvane, on a personal matter, but Leia refuses to reveal the top-secret location. Luke volunteers to escort Shira and take responsibility for bringing her back, with Thorben and Wald joining them. On Shalyvane, Shira leads them to the Circle of Kavaan in the capital of Chinshassa and tells a story of how her people were slaughtered by the savage Em'liy when she was a girl. As she finishes, a horde of Em'liy warriors appears. In the ensuing firefight Shira slips away to her TIE fighter, swings back around, and decimates the attackers. The group returns to Arbra, and Shira never reveals the true purpose of her visit.
title: Star Wars (1977) #60: Shira's Story
